payload.description: Tim David unleashed absolute carnage in the death overs. After getting a reprieve when Anshul Kamboj bowled a no-ball, David smashed a 25-ball 70 not out with 8 sixes. One monstrous hit sailed 106 meters and landed on the Chinnaswamy roof. The crowd went wild as David and Patidar added 87 runs in just 32 balls.
payload.context: RCB was 163/3 after 16 overs, looking at 190-200. David's blitz propelled them to 250/3.
payload.fantasy_impact: David owners received massive 98 points. Those who captained Patidar (48* off 19) got good returns but missed David's bonus.

payload.description: Sarfaraz Khan played a lone warrior innings for CSK. After the top order collapsed, the young batter counterattacked with a 24-ball fifty, including a six off Suyash Sharma that landed in the first tier at deep square-leg. His fighting spirit kept CSK's hopes alive briefly.
payload.context: CSK was struggling at 45/3 chasing 250. Sarfaraz's 50 off 24 brought them back to 120/4.
payload.fantasy_impact: Sarfaraz was a great differential pick, scoring 65 points. His aggressive approach surprised many who had benched him.

payload.description: Jacob Duffy and Bhuvneshwar Kumar ripped through CSK's top order. Duffy got the dangerous Ruturaj Gaikwad early with a sharp inswinger. Bhuvi then removed both Devon Conway and Ajinkya Rahane in the same over with his trademark swing. CSK were reeling at 30/3.
payload.context: CSK chasing 250. Early wickets destroyed their chase momentum completely.
payload.fantasy_impact: Bhuvneshwar's 3 wickets gave 75 points. Duffy's early breakthrough was crucial for fantasy teams.

payload.description: Ruturaj Gaikwad later admitted in the post-match presentation that dropping Virat Kohli early was the turning point. Kohli was on 15 when he edged one to slip, but the chance went down. Kohli went on to score a steady 45 off 32, anchoring RCB's innings before the David-Patidar onslaught.
payload.context: Kohli on 15, RCB 45/1. The dropped catch proved fatal for CSK.
payload.fantasy_impact: Gaikwad later admitted this cost CSK the match. Kohli's 45 runs after the drop proved decisive.

payload.description: Suyash Sharma bowled a brilliant spell of 1/21 in 4 overs, the most economical of the match. His leg-spin tied down the CSK middle order. He removed the dangerous Sarfaraz Khan with a googly and kept the pressure on throughout.
payload.context: CSK trying to rebuild at 120/4. Suyash's tight bowling prevented acceleration.
payload.fantasy_impact: Suyash was a budget pick gem at 8 credits, giving 45 points with an economy bonus.

payload.description: Jacob Duffy removed the dangerous Hardik Pandya for 40 off 22 balls. Pandya was looking to accelerate MI's chase but lost his shape trying to slog a wide delivery outside off. The thick outside-edge flew to Romario Shepherd at deep backward point who took a comfortable catch. This wicket effectively sealed the match for RCB.
payload.context: MI chasing. Hardik's wicket at this stage was the final nail in the coffin.
payload.fantasy_impact: Duffy's wicket of Hardik was crucial - 25 points for the dismissal. Hardik's 40 gave 55 points before his dismissal.

payload.description: Sherfane Rutherford showcased his power-hitting abilities with a series of massive sixes. He deposited Suyash Sharma into the first tier at deep square-leg with a slog-sweep. Rutherford's quickfire 30 off 15 balls kept MI in the hunt briefly before the required rate climbed too high.
payload.context: MI trying to chase down RCB's total. Rutherford's sixes brought temporary hope.
payload.fantasy_impact: Rutherford's cameo gave 42 points. A good value pick for his strike rate.

payload.description: Jacob Duffy produced a sensational new-ball performance on his IPL debut. With the Chinnaswamy pitch offering spongy bounce and movement, Duffy removed Travis Head and Abhishek Sharma in his opening spell. Both batsmen were caught behind trying to drive. This twin strike reduced SRH to 20/2 and gave RCB early control.
payload.context: SRH batting first. Duffy's 3 wickets in powerplay changed the entire match.
payload.fantasy_impact: Duffy's dream debut gave 85 points. Taking Head and Abhishek - two explosive openers - was fantasy gold.

payload.description: Virat Kohli became the FIRST batter in IPL history to cross 4000 runs in successful chases. He achieved this with a masterful 69 not out off 38 balls, including 4 fours and 3 sixes. The Chinnaswamy crowd gave him a standing ovation as he raised his bat. His last 5 scores against SRH read: 100, 42, 51, 43, 69*.
payload.context: RCB chasing 202. Kohli anchored the chase with another classic innings.
payload.fantasy_impact: Kohli's consistency in chases makes him an S-tier captaincy option. 89 points this match.

payload.description: Phil Salt took a stunning one-handed catch diving to his right to dismiss Shivam Dube. The ball was traveling quickly off the edge, but Salt flew across and plucked it inches from the ground. This catch broke CSK's momentum and showcased Salt's wicketkeeping excellence.
payload.context: SRH rebuilding at 100/4. The catch triggered another collapse.
payload.fantasy_impact: Salt's catch gave him 15 fielding points. His keeping skills add fantasy value beyond batting.

payload.description: Devdutt Padikkal played an absolute blinder at the top of the order. He took on the SRH bowlers from ball one, smashing 48 off just 19 balls with 8 fours and 2 sixes. His aggressive approach allowed Kohli to play himself in. One shot over mid-on for six off a slower ball was particularly breathtaking.
payload.context: RCB chasing 202. Padikkal's blitz (48 off 19) set up the chase perfectly.
payload.fantasy_impact: Padikkal's quickfire knock gave 72 points. Perfect example of a high-risk, high-reward differential pick.

payload.description: RCB completed the chase of 202 in just 15.4 overs - the FASTEST 200-plus chase in IPL history! The previous record was RR vs GT in 2025 (15.5 overs). Virat Kohli finished with a flourish, hitting a six and two fours in the final over. This emphatic win sent a statement to the entire league.
payload.context: RCB chasing 202. They won with 26 balls to spare, breaking the IPL record.
payload.fantasy_impact: All RCB batsmen gave massive points. This is why chasing at Chinnaswamy is fantasy heaven.
